name: | CRAIG TUCKER! |
description:
★High School AU – The Bet 彡★

Craig and his friends make a reckless bet

Craig has to date the most anxious, socially awkward guy in school for a month: Tweek Tweak. ✦ If Craig can make Tweek fall for him before the month is up, he wins. But if he fails… he owes them so much money.

At first, Craig doesn’t care. It’s just a dumb game. But as he spends more time with Tweek, he realizes he actually likes him. The problem? Tweek finds out about the bet before Craig can tell him the truth.

♡
creator: Shishojusa
